helpful: The statpack.md provided a clear base rate for the Seventh Circuit.
The MCP search tool helped confirm the absence of a broad circuit split.
gaps: The `fedcourts query` CLI lacked a free-text search option (`--text`), which made it harder to pull relevant priors based on legal concepts directly from the corpus.
notes: The provisioned documents (petition and BIO) were sufficient to identify the vehicle flaws (facial challenge) that make a grant unlikely.
